data.name: Tactics & Strategy Master 2:Princess of Holy Light（圣光战姬）
data.detailed_description:
SERIES


New game released


Coming soon


關於此遊戲

如果您對我們的產品感興趣，請關注我們的組動態：

1、美少女主題遊戲

遊戲中的角色為各式各樣的美少女，她們都是公主出身，但因為境遇的不同，分別擔任著不同的職業。遊戲中你可以隨時與已經加入隊伍的公主進行聖光儀式^O^

2、自由度極高的戰棋
與前作不同的是，本作中的發展路線將十分靈活，玩家將可以接受不同的任務，是扮演聖者還是魔王，都取決於自己，所以隨著故事的發展，善惡的不同也將觸發不同的主線任務

3、豐富的技能體系
遊戲中的職業將擁有可以替換裝備的主動技能與被動技能，玩家需要在技能庫中選擇合適的2個技能裝備上才能發揮功效，並且根據自身的特點，善用技能之間的組合關係來通關。

4、用宏大的世界觀開啟新的篇章
與前作不同的是，從本作開始，整個的世界觀架構將會被重新洗牌，展現在我們眼前的是一個多元化的世界架構，不同的國家，不同的特點，一切請在故事中自由探尋吧。

Features：
  • 美少女
  • 復古風格的戰棋遊戲
  • 200種武器
  • 自由度極高的戰棋遊戲
  • 若干種主動技能與被動技能的搭配
  • 簡體中文、繁體中文和英文

data.supported_languages: 英文, 繁體中文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Tactics & Strategy Master 2:Princess of Holy Light（圣光战姬）
data.detailed_description:
SERIES


New game released


Coming soon


About the Game

If you are interested in our products, please pay attention to our group news:

1. Beautiful girl-themed Game

The characters in this game are all kinds of beautiful girls. They are all princesses, but they have different occupations because of their different situations. In the game, you can always perform the Holy Light Ceremony with a princess who has joined the team ^O^

2. The game's freedom is extremely high
Different from the previous one, the progress route in this game is very flexible. Players will be able to attempt different tasks. Whether the player is a saint or a devil, it is up to the player to decide. Therefore, as the story continues, the various good or evil acts will also trigger different mainline tasks

3. Rich skill system
The game's careers have different passive and active skills that can replace equipment. Players need to select the appropriate skills from the skill pool to play their role, and use the combinations of skills to progress according to their own desires

4. Open A New Chapter With A grand Worldview

Differing from the previous game, the entire world's structure is reshuffled. What is presented is a diversified world with different countries and different characteristics, all free to explore in the story - Let's go!

Features：
  • Beautiful girls
  • A retro style turn-based wargame
  • 200 different weapons
  • A highly liberal game of chess
  • A combination of many active and passive skills
  • Supports Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, and English
